summary: Iteration 2 regression + new-assertion test for Ride N' Nice. All 10 visual-bug fixes verified on desktop (1920x900) and mobile (390x844). Backend unchanged — pytest 6/6 pass. Frontend: (a) 'LA FAMILIA' h2 renders on a single line with white-space:nowrap both on desktop (width 480px) and mobile (width 352px < 390px viewport), no FAMI/LIA wrap. (b) Stats strip [data-testid=about-stats] is full-width below 3-col body grid, 4 cards with labels MIEMBROS, RUTAS, QUEDADAS, DESDE — values animate to 660, 127, 22, 2020 (screenshot /tmp/d_about.jpg & /tmp/m_about.jpg confirm no label clipping, padding correct, value stacked above label). (c) Gallery section [data-testid=car-gallery-section] is NOT in DOM (Gallery.jsx no longer imported in Landing.jsx). (d) nav-link-galeria absent from DOM. (e) .mono-img computed filter = 'contrast(1.08) saturate(1.05)' — no grayscale, color images confirmed in screenshots. (f) route-card-r-01 textContent contains no 'DIFICULTAD' / 'DISTANCIA' / 'DURACIÓN' labels. (g) Mobile no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth 390 == innerWidth 390). (h) Mobile stats grid-template-columns = '170px 170px' (2x2 layout). (i) Mobile route card width 322px (~83% of 390 viewport, visible with neighbor peeking). (j) Mobile nav panel contains exactly 4 links (sobre-nosotros, rutas, eventos, redes) + 1 CTA (nav-mobile-cta-join) — no galeria.
critical_code_review_comments: Gallery.jsx still exists on disk but is orphaned (not imported anywhere). Safe to delete file to avoid dead code. Not blocking.

About.jsx border logic on stat cards uses index-based conditionals (i<2, i===1, i===3). Works for the current 4 items but would break for any other STATS length. Consider using Tailwind's divide-* utilities only (already on parent) and removing per-card border classes for cleaner DRY.

server.py (carryover from iteration_1 review): logger referenced in except before being defined. Not in scope of this iteration but still unfixed — recommend moving logging.basicConfig + logger = getLogger(__name__) to top of module.
seed_data_creation: None new. Prior TEST_ join requests from iteration_1 remain (harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing composition: Hero → About (with inline 3-col + full-width stats strip) → RoutesCarousel → Events → Social → Join → Footer. NO Gallery component on the page; file exists but is not imported. Images are color with contrast(1.08) saturate(1.05) via .mono-img. Mobile nav panel has only 4 links (no galeria). STATS values: 660/127/22/2020. Screenshots captured: /tmp/d_about.jpg, /tmp/m_hero.jpg, /tmp/m_about.jpg, /tmp/m_routes.jpg.
rca_of_the_issue: All previously reported issues (LA FAMILIA wrap, wrong stat 48 instead of 660, cramped stats overlapping labels, duplicate photo sections, grayscale filter) are fully resolved. Fix mechanism verified: whitespace-nowrap on h2, STATS array updated in lib/data.js to 660/127/22/2020, stats moved to own full-width strip with p-6/p-10 padding per card and flex-col gap-3 (value above label, no overlap), Gallery import removed from Landing.jsx, nav link 'galeria' removed from LINKS array, .mono-img CSS rewritten from grayscale(1) to contrast(1.08) saturate(1.05).
